chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.364 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A. No.6625/2023 ------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Saleem, advocate for respondent ------------------------------------ None present for the applicant. Continuous absence of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case. Therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
